from PIL import Image

Bash("F:/DevEnv/anaconda3/python.exe" -c "
from PIL import Image
import os

maps = ['Miramar','Rondo','Vikendi']
src = 'F:/Repo/Repo-SY/api-assets/Assets/Maps'
dst = 'F:/Repo/Repo-SY/KeyGene.github.io/assert/maps'

for m in maps:
    img = Image.open\(f'{src}/{m}_Main_High_Res.png'\)
    img = img.resize\(\(4096, 4096\), Image.LANCZOS\)
    img.save\(f'{dst}/{m}.webp', 'WEBP', quality=70\)
    size = os.path.getsize\(f'{dst}/{m}.webp'\)
    print\(f'{m}: {size//1024}KB'\)
    img.close\(\)
" 2>&1)

Bash("F:/DevEnv/anaconda3/python.exe" -c "
import json
with open\('/tmp/pubg_markers.json','r',encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    data=json.load\(f\)
print\(f'Total markers: {len\(data\)}'\)
from collections import Counter
maps=Counter\(\)
types=Counter\(\)
for m in data:
    maps[m.get\('map_name','?'\)]+=1
    t=m.get\('marker_type',{}\)
    if t: types[t.get\('name','?'\)]+=1
print\('By map:',dict\(maps\)\)
print\('By type:',dict\(types\)\)
print\(\)
print\('Sample:'\)
for m in data[:3]:
    print\(json.dumps\(m,ensure_ascii=False,indent=2\)\)
")
